violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Stove is not under the hood system.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Observed the reach in freezer had build up of frost inside at the time of inspection
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. No test strips at the time of inspection.
Prep/vegetable sink. — --Observed on three comp sink no air gap. this is where they wash the fruit and vegetables.
Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Carpeting was installed as floor covering where not allowed. Observed carpeting in the dry storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Observed the ceiling in the dish room damaged at the time of inspection. Observed the walls and floors in the kitchen need to be cleaned more frequently.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Observed stove is not under vent hood.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed soda dispenser in C-store needs Diet Mt. Dew handle cleaned.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Observed doors and sides of appliances need to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floors, walls, and ceiling need to be cleaned in food prep area.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked and broken floor tiles in food prep area.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
